titleStmt.title: SII 36.152: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 152. (A.R. No. 152 of 1910.) BŌḶUMĀMPAṬṬI (Ikkarai Bōḷuvāmpaṭṭi), COIMBATORE TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Nāgēśvara temple.

summary.p: Records a gift of half mā of land for providing puffed rice (poṟi), and other sacred food offerings during some ceremony (tiruttāḷa kūṭṭam), to the deity in the Tirunāgīśvaram-Uḍaiyār temple at Muṭṭam alias Amarabuyaṅgaranallūr in Pērūr-nāḍu by Viḻumipuṭṭiyāṉ Daṉapālaṉ. An irrigation canal, Vīranārāyaṇa-vāykkāl is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī Irācarācadevaṟku yāṇṭu mūṉṟāvatu perūr
nāṭṭu muṭṭamāna Amarapuyaṅkara nallūr Āḷuṭaiyār tirunā
giśvaramuṭaiyāṟku Ivvūr maṉṟāṭi kamukakkuṭaiyāril viḻu
mipuṭṭiyān tanapālaneṉ tiruttāḷak kūṭṭattukku viṭṭa ni
lamāvatu Amarapuyaṅkara vatikku kiḻakku vīranārāyaṇa vāykkā
lukku teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ caturattu
ṉa tevatānattukku kaṭaiya viṭṭa nilam Araimā Iṉni
lam Arai maāvum poriyavalt tiruppaṇṇikarattukkum Amutu
paṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcunaṅkaḷukkum viṭṭu candrādittavaṟ celvatāka
kalveṭṭik kuṭuttamaikku panmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 36.152 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
